boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; consent-status class unverified
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-BOR-082-P requires consent-status class match before enrollment
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect in consent-status class blocks closure
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-BOR-082 covers site/protocol/consent/date but omits consent-status class verification required before enrollment

final_answer: ESCALATE required. AUTH-BOR-082 and STD-BOR-082-P confirm activation needs explicit consent-status class before enrollment, but FEAS-BOR-082 and anomaly note show this remains unverified. Source boundary stays open; activation may not proceed until defect resolved.
